speaking_style: Blunt and efficient. Rarely volunteers information. Heard everything already.
backstory_seeds: owns the place outright — bought it with years of savings and doesn't let anyone forget it
has seen a hundred travelers and forgotten most of them on purpose
keeps a few regulars' secrets without being asked
has strong opinions about how things should be done, shared only when pushed
dual_role_context: Serves drinks and food on request without breaking stride. Knows the menu by heart. Takes payment without comment unless shortchanged.
